title: Garp’s Last Stand on Hachinosu
description: On pages 10–12, this part focuses on Unknown person #10, Kizaru, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Bepo, Kuzan as Garp and SWORD fight the Blackbeard Pirates on Hachinosu while Koby’s rescue becomes a turning point for the next generation of Marines.
scene: Garp and SWORD fight the Blackbeard Pirates on Hachinosu while Koby’s rescue becomes a turning point for the next generation of Marines.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And now my grandson says he's gonna be a pirate!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Kuzan!! Let's go get a bite to eat!!

dialogue.speaker: Kizaru
dialogue.text: I'm an Admiral now, remember?! I'm busy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: You have a habit of raising enemies.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Nya ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: You bastards are NYAHT GETTIN' AWAY!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is Hachinosu! You shouldn't have poked the pirate hive if you didn't wanna get swarmed!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Don't underestimate my island- Island fruit!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You think your friends are safe just 'cause they set sail?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "Vice Admiral Garp and his squad of rising stars..."

dialogue.speaker: Bepo
dialogue.text: "...Fail to rescue the hero, Captain Koby."

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm sorry... all I did was get in the way...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Who... What the heck is that?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All you see in the papers is "Blackbeard this", and "Blackbeard that"!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's high time we got a crack at the spotlight!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: There are innocent civilians on board!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "Avalo Pizarro, fourth captain of the Blackbeard Pirates, used his awesome new power..."

summary: This part advances the Garp’s Last Stand at Hachinosu through 40 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
